'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 109''' is the one hundred ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 28]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The rise of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]
*Defense of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]
*[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]
*[[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]
*[[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] - wildlife
*[[PIP/2 systems control droid]]
*[[Nova-class battle cruiser]]
